query:
UPDATE samples s
               SET creador_id = r.contribuidor_id
               FROM relaciones_sample r
               WHERE (r.sample_fuente_id = s.id OR r.sample_destino_id = s.id)
                 AND r.contribuidor_id IS NOT NULL
                 AND s.cancion_origen_id IS NOT NULL
                 AND s.creador_id = $1
